WANDERER-STRIKE_WANDERER.title: Strike
WANDERER-DEFEND_WANDERER.title: Defend
WANDERER-SHIFT.title: Shift
WANDERER-SHIFT_JODAN.title: Jodan
WANDERER-SHIFT_CHUDAN.title: Chudan
WANDERER-SHIFT_HASSO.title: Hasso
WANDERER-SHIFT_GEDAN.title: Gedan
WANDERER-SHIFT_WAKI.title: Waki
WANDERER-THRUST.title: Thrust
WANDERER-THRUST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Next turn, gain {Energy} energy.
WANDERER-SLASH.title: Slash
WANDERER-WEAVE.title: Weave
WANDERER-WEAVE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} block.
Next turn, draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
WANDERER-DISENGAGE.title: Disengage
WANDERER-DISENGAGE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} block.
Next turn, lose {Energy:diff()} energy.
WANDERER-DIE_PERIOD.title: Die.
WANDERER-DIE_PERIOD.description:
This turn, attacks deal double damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Add Dishonor to your deck.
WANDERER-DEATH_POEM.title: Death Poem
WANDERER-DEATH_POEM.description:
Gain {Energy:diff()} energy.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Whenever anyone dies, put this in to your hand.
WANDERER-DISHONOR.title: Dishonor
WANDERER-TAKE_INITIATIVE.title: Take Initiative
WANDERER-FEINT.title: Feint
WANDERER-FEINT.description: Exhaust an attack and gain block equal to its damage.
WANDERER-SHIFTING_STRIKE.title: Shifting Strike
WANDERER-SHIFTING_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put Shift in to your hand.
WANDERER-YIELD.title: Yield
WANDERER-YIELD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} block.
Put Shift in to your hand.
WANDERER-FLOW.title: Flow
WANDERER-FLOW.description: Whenever you enter a stance, gain {FlowPower:diff()} block.
WANDERER-TORRENT.title: Torrent
WANDERER-TORRENT.description: Whenever you enter a stance, deal {TorrentPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
WANDERER-KEIKAKU.title: Keikaku
WANDERER-PREEMPT.title: Preempt
WANDERER-PREEMPT.description: Apply all Next Turn powers immediately.
WANDERER-ARRIVE_LATE.title: Arrive Late
WANDERER-ARRIVE_LATE.description: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} weak and {VulnerablePower:diff()} vulnerable to ALL enemies.
WANDERER-DUAL_STRIKE.title: Dual Strike
WANDERER-DUAL_STRIKE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy 2 times.
WANDERER-TSUKI.title: Tsuki
WANDERER-TSUKI.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Hits an additional time for each other time you've attacked this turn.
WANDERER-FLICK.title: Flick
WANDERER-ZANGEKI.title: Zangeki
WANDERER-ZANGEKI.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Next turn, lose {Energy:diff()} energy.
WANDERER-JODAN.title: Jodan
WANDERER-WAKI.title: Waki
WANDERER-PLUNGE.title: Plunge
WANDERER-PLUNGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Next turn, draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
